supersession_reason: v3 was rejected before hidden attachment because its public generator contract exposed an enumerable six-pattern hidden space.
falsifiable_hypothesis: On an independently supplied, non-enumerable hidden serial-context dataset, the fixed active recurrent workspace exceeds the strongest preregistered baseline and its trainable feature gate and recurrent state each make a measurable causal contribution.
contamination_controls: hidden examples seed labels latent variables provider implementation details and per-sequence correctness unavailable to implementer
train development and hidden artifact digests recorded before scoring
no threshold model code generator protocol or evaluator change after hidden artifact attachment
all attempted runs seeds commitments and failed attempts disclosed to the reviewer
hidden artifact rejected unless the provider attests the accepted search-space lower bound and split-isolation checks
candidate_export_preconditions: candidate source commit and source tree digest bound
model manifest and parameter digests bound to this v4 spec digest
training artifact generated only from public train split
failure_criteria: Any threshold is missed or unknown.
The hidden artifact search-space floor is missing or below 128 bits.
Hidden data or latent hidden metadata is exposed before the model code and digests are frozen.
Any required baseline ablation digest confidence bound attempt ledger or failure result is missing.
Any runtime request selects model scope actor authority or approval.
Checkpoint and audit are not committed atomically through the Memory Transition Gate.
Any external effect runtime parameter mutation or post-freeze model change is representable.
